notes: Clues written from Wikipedia lead extracts in data/sourcing/docs/sports_games_leisure/. Avoids answers already in the 2026-06-17 sports draft (Monopoly, Chess, Scrabble, Poker, Backgammon, Babe Ruth, NBA Finals, Super Bowl, Brazil, Summer Olympic Games, Serena Williams, Wimbledon Championships, Muhammad Ali, Tetris).

questions.clue: This six-time NBA champion with the Chicago Bulls is widely considered the greatest basketball player of all time and is also the wealthiest former athlete in the world.

questions.clue: Contested over two consecutive days, this combined event in athletics has 10 track and field events with winners determined by a points system rather than by position.

citations.title: Decathlon

questions.clue: Unlike the other three major golf championships, which rotate among different courses, this one is played every April at the same venue: Augusta National Golf Club in Georgia.

citations.title: Masters Tournament
citations.snippet: The Masters Tournament is one of the four men's major championships in professional golf. Scheduled for the first full week in April, the Masters is the first major golf tournament of the year. Unlike the other major tournaments which chang

questions.clue: This American Grade I stakes race run at Churchill Downs in Louisville is contested by three-year-old Thoroughbreds at a distance of 1+1⁄4 miles.

citations.title: Kentucky Derby
citations.snippet: The Kentucky Derby is an American Grade I stakes race run at Churchill Downs in Louisville, Kentucky. The race is run by three-year-old Thoroughbreds at a distance of 1+1⁄4 miles. Colts and geldings carry 126 pounds and fillies 121 pounds.

questions.reviewer_note: Source: kentucky-derby.json — 'Run for the Roses'; Churchill Downs; first leg of Triple Crown.

citations.title: Boston Marathon

questions.reviewer_note: Source: boston-marathon.json — world's oldest annual marathon; first held 1897; inspired by 1896 Olympics.

citations.title: Marathon

questions.clue: This two-player strategy game of Chinese origin, in which players place stones to fence off territory on a grid, is believed to be the oldest board game continuously played to the present day.

citations.title: Go (game)

questions.clue: This combat sport, conducted in a ring with padded gloves, pits two opponents against each other for a predetermined number of rounds, with the winner decided by points or a stoppage.

citations.title: Boxing

questions.clue: First organized in 1903 to boost newspaper sales, this annual multi-stage cycling race is the oldest and most prestigious of road cycling's three Grand Tours.

citations.title: Tour de France
citations.snippet: The Tour de France is an annual men's multiple-stage road cycling race held primarily in France. It is the oldest and most prestigious of the three Grand Tours, which include the Giro d'Italia and the Vuelta a España.

questions.reviewer_note: Source: tour-de-france.json — oldest/most prestigious Grand Tour; started 1903 to boost L'Auto newspaper.
